prompt: A clean premium VECTOR LOGO MARK on a pure solid WHITE background, centered with generous margin. Brand 'Aevum+' (peptide sciences). The mark is a bold geometric uppercase letter 'A' whose horizontal CROSSBAR is extended into a clean medical PLUS / '+' sign sitting centered inside the A — the A and the plus read as one integrated monogram. Minimal, clinical, confident. Two-tone palette ONLY: San Marino blue (muted slate-denim ~#4D6E9E) and near-black navy, with subtle silver-grey, on white. Below the mark, small clean wordmark 'Aevum+' in a modern sans. Crisp flat vector, no photo, no 3D, correct spelling 'Aevum+'.
